title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: Flash is a deployment tool that replaces complex Docker and GPU allocation workflows with a single decorator. Users add @flash.endpoint to Python functions for direct IDE-to-GPU-cloud deployment with hot reload and per-request pricing via RunPod's infrastructure.
writeup: Audry Hsu of RunPod presents Flash, a deployment tool that collapses Docker setup and GPU allocation into a single decorator. Adding @flash.endpoint to a Python function deploys it directly from the IDE to GPU cloud, with hot reload during iteration and per-request pricing through RunPod's infrastructure. The takeaway: serverless GPU inference and autoscaling become accessible without leaving the editor or managing container and allocation workflows by hand.
